summary: Completed frontend testing of ValuationResults Premium Hero upgrade to Stripe/Linear/Vercel level quality. All 10 premium Hero features verified working correctly: gradient, confidence badge, company label, ultra bold valuation, secondary label, multiple display with delta, micro KPI strip, radial glow effect, CSS styling, and all sections below Hero render correctly.
passed_tests: ValuationResults Hero - hero-premium-card class applied with premium gradient
ValuationResults Hero - Premium gradient verified (180deg from #0842A0 to #1E6AE1) with linear-gradient CSS
ValuationResults Hero - Confidence Badge renders top-right with green dot, 'Moderate Confidence', and metric count 'Based on 6 metrics'
ValuationResults Hero - Company name 'SPEEL' displays as small uppercase label with tracking-[0.2em]
ValuationResults Hero - Valuation amount $23.4M is ultra bold (font-extrabold class verified)
ValuationResults Hero - 'Estimated Enterprise Value' secondary label displays with font-medium class
ValuationResults Hero - Multiple display shows base muted (12x with text-white/40), final bold (7.8x with font-semibold), and delta indicator (-4.20x discount with amber styling)
ValuationResults Hero - Micro KPI strip shows all 4 metrics: ARR $3.0M, 50% Growth, 85% Gross Margin, 78% NRR
ValuationResults Hero - Radial glow effect (blur-3xl element) renders behind valuation amount
ValuationResults Hero - CSS styles verified: border-radius 20px, overflow hidden, box-shadow with multiple layers, gradient colors match expected
ValuationResults Hero - Noise texture overlay (::before pseudo-element) applied via CSS
ValuationResults Hero - Radial glow overlay (::after pseudo-element) for center glow effect
ValuationResults page - Exit Readiness Score section visible (score 52, Top 51%)
ValuationResults page - Potential Deal Killers section visible (2 deal killers)
ValuationResults page - Buyer Fit Analysis section visible
ValuationResults page - Exit Optimization Roadmap section visible
ValuationResults page - What-If Simulator section visible
ValuationResults page - Exit Scenarios section visible
ValuationResults page - Valuation Range section visible (Conservative $16.4M, Base $23.4M, Optimistic $32.8M)
ValuationResults page - Executive Summary section visible with Strengths, Risks, Exit Readiness
ValuationResults page - Sidebar Quick Snapshot showing correct values: ARR $3.0M, Growth 50%, Gross Margin 85%, NRR 78%, Multiple Used 7.8x
Business calculations unchanged - valuation amounts ($23.4M base) consistent with sidebar and other displays
critical_code_review_comments: Premium Hero upgrade implemented correctly with clean CSS-first approach
hero-premium-card CSS in App.css has proper layered design: gradient background, noise texture (::before), radial glow (::after)
ValuationResults.jsx properly uses relative/absolute positioning for Confidence badge (top-4 right-4 / top-6 right-6)
Multiple display logic correctly shows discount (-4.20x) or premium (+Xx) based on comparison of base_multiple vs multiple_used
Micro KPI strip uses appropriate spacing and dots as separators

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all 10 premium Hero features working correctly

seed_data_creation: Used existing valuation val_0b6c1d90d0ec for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Premium Hero upgrade verified working. Key CSS class is .hero-premium-card with gradient (180deg from #0842A0 to #0B4DBB to #1E6AE1), noise texture overlay, and radial glow. Hero elements: Confidence badge (absolute top-right), company name (uppercase tracking), valuation amount (font-extrabold data-testid=valuation-amount), secondary label (Estimated Enterprise Value), Multiple display (base muted -> final bold + delta indicator), Micro KPI strip (ARR/Growth/Margin/NRR).

valuation_amount.glow: blur-3xl div behind for glow effect

multiple_display.delta_indicator: -4.20x discount (bg-amber-500/20 for discount, bg-emerald-500/20 for premium)

micro_kpi_strip.styling: text-white/50 text-xs tracking-wide with dot separators
